issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'Activated'. '[End of Your Turn]' is an end-of-turn trigger.
Action should be a setup/ready action (opposite of Rest). 'Set up' means to make active/ready, not to rest a character.
Target missing type filter for {ODYSSEY}. Should include 'hasType:ODYSSEY' in filters.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] Set up to 1 of your {ODYSSEY} type Characters with a cost of 4 or less as active.
